summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification over 10 seed PRs. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard. No close, merge, or fix actions are planned: merge/fix are blocked by job frontmatter, low-signal closeout is disabled, and most open PRs need proof, review, rebase, or maintainer follow-up. Security-sensitive #39496 is quarantined with route_security only.
